titleStmt.title: SII 22.398: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 398. (A.R. No. 398 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. SATYAGIRINĀTHA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: The inscription is damaged. It records the endowment of the village Koṭṭaiyūr renamed Raghunāthapuram for the conduct of the early morning service in the temple of Aḻagiyameyyar at Tirumeyyam by Śōlaiyappa-Piḷḷai [Gaṅ*]gaivāḍiyā-Piḷḷai of Vānaravīraṉ-Madurai, for the merit of Tirumalai Sētupatikātta Daḷavāy Raghunātha-Narēndra. This is dated in the same year as No. 394 above, and is additional to the gift mentioned therein. The donor is said to have purchased the lands at Kōṭṭaiyūr from the mahājanas of the place and having reclaimed them from their wild and fallow condition, settled several Veḷḷāḷas in the place for their cultivation, before making this grant to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cakāttam 100 5 10 91 Itaṉ melc cellāṉiṉṟa cavumiyavaruṣam taimātam 1 tiyati śrīmatu tirumalaic cetupatikātta taḷavāy rakunāta narentiraṉukkup puṇṇiyamāka vānaraviraṉ maturai Ilirukkum colaiyappa piḷḷai kaṅkaiyāṭiyāpiḷḷai kānaṉāṭṭut tirumeyyam Aḻakiya meyyarukku Utayakālattil rakunāta Avacarattukku kiṟāmaṅkoṇṭu certtapaṭi Iṉṉāṭṭuk koṭṭaiyūrp pālil Anāti taricāy kāṭum
meṭumākāmal Akarapattāka yiruntu Itu vayal valaiyaṉvayal Iḷampūr vuḷṭṭa makācanaṅkaḷ kaiyyil Irukka ṉkaik kirayacātaṉam paṇṇikkoṇṭu Atu veḷḷāḻar kaṇakkark kaiyil kaṇakkar koṭṭaiyūr veḷḷāḻar palar vanta kārāṇmaikkum kiṟayacātaṉam paṇṇikkoṇṭu vaḷam paṇṇi vaitta kiṟāmattukku rakunātapurameṉṟu perumiṭṭu tiruvāḻikkallum poṭuvi
ttu Atil koṭṭaiyūr perumāḷ ḷukku teyvatāyam Orumā nilamum pirammatāyam karoti variṣam Aippati ḷukku mutalāna pirammatāyamuṇṭāṉatu mākak ka , koṭṭaiyūrp puravil rakunātapuram putuvayal Āma , tiruvāḻik kallukkuḷpaṭṭa nañcai puñcai māvaṭai maravaṭai nitiniṭcepa cala pāṣāṇamuḷpaṭa cakalappiṟāttiyum
, vomākavum Ittaṉmattukku yātāmoruvar Irumaṉṉāyam nāṭṭā rakaranāṭṭu veḷḷāḻar maṇiyakāraril yātāmoruvar vikātam paṇṇinaper keṅkaikkarai Il kārāmpacuvaik koṉṉa
camayattuk perum koṭṭaiyūr Ūravarum kūṭi kuṟai tirttuk kuṭukkakaṭavārākavum Allatu Ābā[ saṅka] ḷum muṉ coṉṉa toṣattile tāne pokakkaṭavarākavum 2 śrīrāma
Digital edition of SII 22.398 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
